channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Ben Shelton to return to the Australian Open final
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Defending champion Jannik Sinner overcame some third-set cramping and beat Ben Shelton 7-6 (2), 6-2, 6-2 on Friday to return to the Australian Open final as he seeks a third Grand Slam title. The No.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan basketball seeks to end Mackey Arena drought vs. Purdue amidst shaky play
item.description: Through 18 games, the Michigan Wolverines have a shaky tendency that continues to rear its ugly head at the most inopportune times.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: The new Champions League format appears to be leveling the playing field. Just ask Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — A bold new vision for the Champions League was launched this season, meaning more games and more money for European soccer's elite, as well as a rebuttal to the threat of a controversial breakaway super league.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Utah HC shuts out Minnesota for third straight victory
item.description: ST. PAUL (AP) - Karel Vejmelka made 26 saves for his first shutout of the season, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-0 at Xcel Energy Center on Thursday. “We did a great job,” Vejmelka said. “Boys played real well in front of me and they helped me a lot.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nikola Jokic hits 66-foot heave to highlight his 5th straight triple-double
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic took an inbounds pass with 1.7 seconds left in the third quarter, turned and let fly with a 66-foot heave that got all net at the other end. He casually walked over to his bench as his teammates mobbed him and the sold-out arena erupted.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ovechkin moves within 20 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record, Capitals beat Kraken 3-0
item.description: Alex Ovechkin moved within 20 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record with an empty-netter, helping the Washington Capitals beat the Seattle Kraken 3-0 on Thursday night for their sixth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Allyson Ballard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alysa Liu returns from 2-year absence and leads after short program at US Championships
item.description: WICHITA, Kan. (AP) — Alysa Liu wore the smudge of blood on her dress at the U.S. Figure Skating Championships on Thursday night like a poignant badge of honor, symbolic of everything she has gone through over the past few years. The 19-year-old has been through some battles.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Recording captured ex-interpreter impersonating Ohtani to transfer $200,000, prosecutors say
item.description: A nearly four-minute audio recording allegedly captured Shohei Ohtani 's former interpreter Ippei Mizuhara impersonating the baseball star on a call with a bank as he attempted to transfer $200,000 for what he describes as a car loan, federal prosecutors said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AOC, Jeffries remain silent on Democrat backlash after saying anti-trans athlete bill empowers child predators
item.description: Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have not addressed voter backlash to the argument that protecting women's sports would empower child predators.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Seth Moulton gets fundraising haul after slamming trans athlete inclusion, prompting second pro-trans rally
item.description: Seth Moulton reportedly saw a fundraising surge after speaking out against transgender inclusion in women's sports, but he also faced a second protest by his office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Ohio State coach Urban Meyer takes aim at 'idiots on social media' after Buckeyes win national title
item.description: Former Ohio State Buckeyes head coach Urban Meyer, who was in Atlanta on Monday to watch Ohio State win the national championship, came to the defense of current Buckeyes coach Ryan Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN analyst reveals how ex-colleague's Obama comments became point of contention
item.description: Ryan Clark hopped on Michele Tafoya's podcast to discuss his "only" issue with Sage Steele and why, at one point, he did not want to work with her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 people charged with selling forged Jason Kelce memorabilia
item.description: Three people are alleged to have forged Jason Kelce's signature on more than 1,100 memorabilia items that sold for at least $200,000 at a signing event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki wants to sit down and talk to Hall of Fame voter who kept him from being a unanimous inductee
item.description: Ichiro Suzuki said he wants to meet with the one person who voted against his induction into the Hall of Fame after he fell one vote shy of being unanimous.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA still talking about expanding its footprint in Europe, Adam Silver says
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The NBA is still exploring ways to expand its role in European basketball and those talks with FIBA and other stakeholders will continue, Commissioner Adam Silver said Thursday. That means there's no deal — yet.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick and North Carolina have a signed contract for his hiring as football coach
item.description: North Carolina football coach Bill Belichick and school officials have signed his official employment contract, formalizing last month's hiring after speculation that the six-time Super Bowl-winning head coach might opt instead for a return to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Plenty of college reps helped Jayden Daniels and Bo Nix make an immediate impact in the NFL
item.description: Jayden Daniels threw 1,438 passes in 55 college games over five seasons. He’s been no ordinary rookie because he played plenty of football before coming to the NFL. Same for Bo Nix, who was a five-year starter at Auburn and Oregon.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mariano Rivera, wife break silence after being accused of covering up child sex abuse
item.description: New York Yankees legend Mariano Rivera and his wife broke their silence on Thursday amid allegations they covered up child sex abuse at their home and church.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Massive brawl breaks out at end of indoor soccer league match
item.description: A Major Arena Soccer League match descended into chaos on Saturday as a huge brawl broke out after the Milwaukee Wave defeated the Tacoma Stars in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander torches Jazz for career-high 54
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a matchup between the Western Conference's best and worst teams, the Utah Jazz (10-32) gave the Oklahoma City Thunder (36-7) quite a scare on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NCDC Hockey Showcase Series coming to Grand Junction Feb. 8 and 9
item.description: On Feb. 8 and 9, River City Sportplex is hosting the Idaho Spud Kings and Rock Springs Grizzlies of the USPHL junior hockey league NCDC.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: BYU bounces back with 83-67 win over Colorado
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) - After losing four of its last five games, the BYU basketball team turned it on in the second half in route to an 83-67 win over Colorado Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: Utah closes homestand strong with 5-2 win over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After a slow start to their season-long 7-game homestand, the Utah Hockey Club finished it strong. Barrett Hayton scored and had two assists, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Winnipeg Jets 5-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State VS. Notre Dame: Facts to know before the CFP Championship kickoff
item.description: The Buckeyes and Fighting Irish meet Monday night in the College Football Playoff national championship game at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, Fox 5

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
